text: What happened? Did you talk to Tony?
What did he say?
Yes, mom. I have talked to Tony. I will
stay with his mother after marriage.
That house is huge.
One more thing, he will buy a new house
for me.
What? Are you crazy? Can you stay with
his crazy mom? You know her mental
health.
I am going to marry Tony.
I can do anything.
It is your meny night today. You have to
wear red dress. I don't want to hear
anything. I want to show off in front of
Tony's family.
No, mom. No. I will not wear that dress.
You cannot force me.
Jane, your lunch is ready.
What happened? Are you okay?
It is my meny function today. I don't
want to wear that red dress.
I don't like this ritual.
Mom is forcing me. I will not wear that
dress.
You have to help me, Zara.
Okay, Jane. I will help you.
I really like this party. Where is Jane?
It is her Meny night. I am glad you
liked it. Jane will come here soon.
I am super excited. I cannot wait to
apply Mendy on her hands. I like this
ritual.
What? I don't like this ritual. I have
to carry Jane and bring her to her
bridal room.
You have to do it, Tony. You are a brave
boy. It is a ritual. It is your meny
night as well. Go and bring Jane to her
bridal room.
Yes, Tony. I know you can do this.
What? No. No. What are you saying?
Don't worry. It is just a simple task.
You have to wear my dress and go there.
I don't like this ritual. My mom cannot
force me.
Please Jane, I don't want to do this.
You are bridal. You should go there.
They will apply Mendy on your hands.
They will recognize me. Please don't
force me. I don't want to wear your
dress.
You have to do it. It is my order. I
told you before. Go and change your
dress right now. They will not recognize
you. Dot. You can wear a party mask.
I don't like this ritual. Hurry up. We
don't have time.
Okay, Jane.
Where is Jane? She has to come here. She
is getting dressed. She will be here
soon.
You are looking great. Nobody will
recognize you. You have to go now.
Everyone is waiting for you.
They are waiting for you, Jane. I am
Zara. It is your Meny night.
It is fine. It is just a ritual. They
will apply Mendy on your hands.
You are looking pretty. Jane, why are
you wearing this mask?
Jane, why are you mute? Please take off
your mask. We will apply Mendy on your
hands.
I think she is feeling shy. It is your
meny night, Jane.
Jane, it is just a ritual. Don't you
like it? Please take off your mask.
Oh god, what should I do now? Jane made
me do it. I did not want to wear this
dress. She put me on the spot.
Leave my bridal alone. I came here for
Jane.
Did you come here to carry her? Fine,
you can take her. We will apply Mendy
later.
I am sorry, Jane. I did not want to do
this. Why are you mute? What happened?
I am not Jane. Let me take off my mask.
You Why did you wear Jane's dress? How
dare you? What do you want to do now? Do
you want to use me again?
I am sorry. I did not want to wear this
dress. Please listen to me.
Do you want to spend a night with me?
What do you want to do?
I am not a bad girl.
What is going on here? Zara, why did you
slap Tony? I am asking something.
What is this? Why is she wearing your
dress?
Tony, what did you do? I know my
assistant. She is innocent. What did you
do? Why did she slap you?
You should not have done this. She is
wearing your dress. It is your meny
night. You have let me down.
Zara, you will tell me the truth. Why
did you slap Tony? Did he say something
wrong? What did he do? I am sorry, Jane.
It is my fault.
What is going on here?
What is this? Shame on you, Jane. Zara
is wearing your dress. It means she was
there. How could you do this? You ruined
everything. It is your meny night.
I told you, Mom. I don't like this
ritual. I want a simple wedding. You
told me to wear this dress. I don't like
all this. I told Zara to wear this
dress. It is not her fault.
Keep your mouth shut. I will not forgive
you. You have crossed your limits. Let's
go home. You are making me angry.
What did she do?
Dad. Jane was not there. Zara was
wearing her dress. Jane ruined this
night.
I was not expecting this from you, Jane.
Let's go home. We need to talk.
I want to know everything. What did you
do? Why did she slap you?
I am sorry. I did not do anything. I
thought she was Jane. Please leave it.
It was Jane's fault.
I will talk to my cousin. Please don't
scold him. You know Jane, she's like a
little kid. She is very stubborn.
You have let me down, Jane. You ruined
your Mindy night. Your mom did not raise
you well. She has spoiled you a lot.
How could you say this, Dad? I am not a
bad mother. She does not listen to me. I
will talk to her. Enough is enough. I
will not listen to her anymore.
Jane, come with me. I need to talk to
you. Zara, you should also come with us.
Zara, how dare you wear this dress? What
do you think of yourself? You are just a
maid here. My daughter is crazy for you.
You are controlling my daughter.
I am so sorry. I did not want to wear
this dress. Jane told me to wear it. It
will not happen again.
Mom, it is not her fault. Please don't
say anything to her.
Enough is enough. She cannot stay here
anymore. I have spoiled you a lot, Jane.
Zara has to leave this house. You are
fired, Zara.
What? No madam, no. I need this job.
Where will I go? Please forgive me. Zara
will not leave this house. She will stay
here for the rest of her life. Zara is
very special for me. She is not just a
maid.
No way. You are going crazy. She has to
leave this house. Come with me, Zara.
Mom, you cannot do this. Zara will stay
here. She cannot go anywhere.
You will stay here. No more words. Hey
Zara, come with me. Mom, are you for
real? Where are you going?
Mom, open the door. You cannot do this
to me. I am your daughter. Why did you
lock the door? Please don't take her
away. She is just not a maid for me. She
is like my sister. Please, Mom, let her
stay here. I beg you.
She has to leave this house. I will not
let you destroy your life. You are going
crazy. I cannot tolerate your bad
behavior anymore. You are not a kid
anymore.
What is going on here? Why is she
screaming?
Dad, I have to teach her a lesson. She
is crazy for Zara. Zara is leaving this
house. She will not work here anymore.
Jane is not a little girl anymore. Why
did you lock the door? She is going to
marry soon.
Please don't stop me. Enough is enough.
Zara is the problem here. Jane has to
live alone. She has to grow up. She is
going to marry soon. And you, Zara,
don't just stand here. Go and pack your
luggage. I don't want to see you in this
house.
Okay, madam.
Mom, open the door. Please don't send
her away. It was not her fault. I told
her to wear my dress. Please, Mom, let
her stay here. I have to call Tony. He
will help me. He can stop Zara. My mom
will not listen to me.
Hello, Tony.
Please help me. I need your help.
What happened now? You ruined this
night. Why are you crying?
Please come here as soon as possible.
Mom has fired Zara. Zara is going. Mom
is sending her away from me. Please,
Tony, come here as soon as possible. You
stop my mom. I cannot live without Zara.
What? Oh no. Don't worry. I am coming. I
will not let her go.
Why are you crying now? You should have
listened to me. You have lost your job.
I told you before. Jane cannot protect
you. You ruined your life, Zara. I can
lose this job as well. Why did you wear
that dress? Jane is a crazy girl. She
does not have brain. You are a foolish
girl, Zara. I cannot do anything.
I am so sorry, Aunt. I did not know this
would happen.
Nothing can be done now. Pack your
luggage and come with me.
My driver will drop you off. Don't come
here again. Don't meet my daughter
again.
Just go now.
I am sorry madam. I don't want to hurt
anyone.
Zara will not go anywhere.
Tony, what are you doing here? I see
Jane called you. Please go back.
Yes, Jane called me. She is going to be
my wife soon. I cannot see her sad.
Please don't do this. Zara will stay
here with Jane. She slapped me. I
forgave her. It was a mistake.
Zara is our maid. I can fire her. I
don't need your permission. Jane is my
daughter. You should not interfere in my
personal matter.
I said no. She will stay here. I cannot
see Jane sad. Zary, you can go back to
your room.
If you don't have an issue, then she can
stay here.
Dad, what are you saying?
Liz, Zara will stay here.
Zara, you can go back to your room. Jane
needs you.
Oh, Zara, thank God you came back. I
cannot live without you. You are my
family.
You are not just a maid for me. You are
my friend.
Please don't be sad. I am here. I will
not leave this house.
Thank you so much, Tony. You stopped
her. Please have a seat here.
It is okay, Jane. I can see Zara is very
important for you. She is not just a
maid for you.
Yes,
she is like my sister. I hurt her. She
respects me a lot.
Okay, good night. I have to go now. Take
care.
Liz, madam, how can I help you? You know
I don't like Zara. I want to protect my
daughter. She has to leave this house.
You have to do something. You are her
aunt. This is my order. I got it. I have
an idea. Please don't kick her out. I
promise you. She will not stay here for
the rest of her life.
What do you mean? What is your idea?
Someone wants to marry Zara. She has to
marry that person. She will leave this
house after her marriage.
Oka, that's great. She has to marry.
Just let me know.
It was a tough day for us. Go and make
tea for me. I need to relax.
Okay, Jane. You need to rest.
I will make special tea for you.
Aunt,
what happened?
Why are you worried? Liz Madam will not
kick me out. Everything is fine now.
Oh, really? Do you think so?
Liz Madam does not like you. You have to
leave this house. She came here. She
does not want to see you in this house.
You have to marry Zara. You have to
leave this house.
No, aunt. No. Please don't do this to
me. I don't want to marry him. Who is
he? I don't know him. I don't love him.
Are you crazy? You will love him. He is
a good boy. You will like him. You don't
have other choice.
Jane cannot protect you for the rest of
your life. She will marry tomorrow. You
are just a maid for her.
Okay, aunt. I will listen to you.
Good morning, Jane. How are you feeling?
It is your wedding day today.
You will marry Tony today?
I am a little nervous.
I am going to marry Tony soon.
Jane, get ready. We are going now. I
have to deliver your dowy.
What?
No way. I don't need diary.
Tony has everything.
I don't like all this.
I will not listen to you. You don't have
time. I am waiting for you.
Okay.
Zoro will go with us.
Good morning. Is everything okay? We
were going to meet at the wedding hall
today.
I brought Jane's diary. How is everyone?
Zara, what is she doing here?
She is my assistant.
I brought her here. Do you have any
problem?
Fine. I will not say anything.
Tony,
I want to see your room. I will stay
after marriage.
I am going to marry you soon. I am super
excited.
Sure. My room is upstairs. Let's go.
I will see that room. You should go with
Zara outside.
She needs your help. You have to carry
my dowy boxes.
Zara cannot lift those boxes alone.
Okay, don't worry. Let's go. Zara,
what are you trying to do now? Why did
you come here? Do you want to use me
again?
I am not doing anything. I came here for
Jane. Please don't hate me. I have told
you so many times. I did not use you. I
really liked you.
Jane loves you like a sister. She cried
for you. You betrayed her. You knew I
was her fiance.
You don't know anything. I did not
betray her. She is crazy.
You are my childhood crush. I know we
cannot be together. Please don't hurt
me. We will not talk about it again.
No, I need to talk to you.
Max is coming here. Please don't say
anything.
Tony, Jane is calling you. I will help
Zara here.
Okay, I am going.
Zara, I will help you. Are you okay?
Max, I want to say something. I need
your help.
Sure. What happened? How can I help you?
You know, we are friends.
It is a secret. Please don't tell anyone
about it. We will talk later. Can we
meet again? I cannot talk to you here.
Jane is waiting for me.
Yes, sure. We can talk again. You can
tell me anything.
This is our room. Did you like it?
Yes,
I liked it. I am so happy. I will marry
you today.
I think this room is not big. I brought
a lot of dowy for Jane. She needs one
more room.
What are you saying? I liked this room.
This is huge. Where is Zara? She will
stay here after my marriage.
What? Are you crazy? She is your maid.
Why would she stay here? Are you out of
your mind?
What are you saying, Zara? Are you
serious?
Zara has come. She will stay here after
my marriage.
Zara needs a room.
Yes, we don't have an objection. Zarah
can stay here. We have extra room. What
are you trying to do? She is my
daughter. I know what is good for her. I
think we need to talk. Come with me.
Did you see her? Jane cannot live
without you. You should tell her about
us.
You just used me. You did not love me. I
was serious about you. I cannot forget
you.
This is not right. I love you. I was
also serious. I knew you would never
marry me. You will marry Jane today.
Jane is also very important for me.
Please don't hurt me. I wanted to tell
you about my reality, but I could not do
it. I did not want to lose you. You were
my childhood crush.
Jane is my daughter. You are not her
mother. Zara will not stay here. You
just away from my personal matter.
What is your problem? You are
overreacting. Zara is her assistant. She
can stay here. I want to see Jane happy.
It is not a big deal. It is her wedding
day today.
I wanted to stay with you. I could not
tell you about my reality.
I still love you. Please forget me. We
cannot be together.
You will marry Jane today. Jane is also
very important for me. I don't want to
hurt her as well.
I will not betray anyone.
You are made for Jane.
I love you. I could not forget those
moments. I don't love Jane. She is a
crazy girl.
No, Tony,
you have to forget me. I am so sorry. It
is your wedding day today. You are going
to marry Jane today. We will not talk
about it again.
We cannot be together.
This is not right. I will not hurt
anyone.
If I hurt you, please forgive me.
Hey,
hey, hey.
